creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 153370
patch to fix building on gcc-5

As is, libreoffice fails during linking on gcc-5.  The attached patch came from upstream (branch 4.4) and allows gcc-5 to build Libreoffice 4.3.6.

https://www.mail-archive.com/libreoffice@lists.freedesktop.org/msg137590.html
(12 Feb 2015)
